Naruto Uzumaki.quote: I never go back on my word — that's my ninja way!
lore: Born to Minato Namikaze and Kushina Uzumaki, becoming an orphan on his first day of life.
Became the Jinchuriki of the Nine-Tails to protect the Hidden Leaf from destruction.
Endured years of isolation and loneliness to eventually earn the village's acknowledgement.
Mastered the Shadow Clone Jutsu and formed an unbreakable bond with Team 7.
Trained with Jiraiya of the Sannin to develop the Rasengan and master his inner chakra.
Achieved Sage Mode and defeated Pain, becoming the 'Hero of the Hidden Leaf'.
Befriended Kurama (the Nine-Tails) and united all Tailed Beasts in the Great War.
Received the Sage of Six Paths' power to defeat Kaguya Otsutsuki alongside Sasuke.
Broke the cycle of hatred by successfully bringing Sasuke back to the village.
Fulfilled his ultimate dream by becoming the Seventh Hokage of the Hidden Leaf.
He is the younger brother of Itachi Uchiha.
He was the top student in Naruto's academy class.
He left the village to gain power from Orochimaru.
He mastered the Chidori and the Cursed Seal.
He eventually killed his brother Itachi.
He discovered the secret truth about the Uchiha clan.
He awakened the Rinnegan during the war.
He fought Naruto one last time at the Valley of the End.
He lost his left arm in that final battle.
He now travels the world protecting the leaf from afar.

Sakura Haruno.quote: A smile is the easiest way out of a difficult situation.
lore: She was a member of Team 7 alongside Naruto Uzumaki and Sasuke Uchiha.
She trained under the Fifth Hokage, Tsunade.
She became one of the strongest medical ninja in the Hidden Leaf Village.
She mastered chakra-enhanced strength, allowing her to shatter the ground with a punch.
She played a key role in saving many lives during the Fourth Great Ninja War.
She awakened the Strength of a Hundred Seal after years of chakra control training.
She fought alongside Naruto and Sasuke against powerful enemies.
She helped defeat Kaguya Otsutsuki during the final stages of the war.
She later married Sasuke Uchiha.
She became the mother of Sarada Uchiha and continued serving as a leading medical ninja.

Kakashi Hatake.quote: Those who break the rules are scum, but those who abandon their friends are worse than scum.
lore: He is the son of the famous ninja Sakumo Hatake, known as the White Fang.
He became a Chunin at a very young age due to his exceptional talent.
He was a member of Team Minato alongside Obito Uchiha and Rin Nohara.
Obito gifted him a Sharingan after Kakashi lost his left eye during a mission.
He created the Lightning Blade (Raikiri), an advanced form of the Chidori.
He became known throughout the ninja world as the Copy Ninja Kakashi.
He served as the leader of Team 7, mentoring Naruto, Sasuke, and Sakura.
He played a major role in the Fourth Great Ninja War.
He temporarily awakened the Mangekyo Sharingan and used Kamui in battle.
After the war, he became the Sixth Hokage of the Hidden Leaf Village.

Itachi Uchiha.quote: People live their lives bound by what they accept as correct and true.
lore: He was a prodigy of the Uchiha clan and graduated from the academy at a very young age.
He became an ANBU captain while still a teenager.
He was the elder brother of Sasuke Uchiha.
He was ordered to eliminate the Uchiha clan to prevent a civil war.
He spared Sasuke and encouraged him to grow stronger.
He joined the Akatsuki as a double agent to protect the Hidden Leaf Village from the shadows.
He possessed the Mangekyo Sharingan and mastered powerful techniques such as Tsukuyomi and Amaterasu.
He was defeated by Sasuke in their long-awaited battle.
After being reincarnated during the Fourth Great Ninja War, he helped stop the Edo Tensei technique.
His true sacrifices and love for Sasuke were revealed after his death, making him one of the most respected shinobi in Naruto.

Gaara.quote: A person grows up when he's able to overcome hardships.
lore: He is the youngest son of the Fourth Kazekage of the Hidden Sand Village.
He was made the jinchuriki of Shukaku, the One-Tailed Beast, before birth.
He was feared and isolated by the people of his village during childhood.
He initially believed that only through killing could he prove his existence.
He fought Naruto Uzumaki during the Chunin Exams invasion.
Naruto's determination and friendship changed Gaara's outlook on life.
He became the Fifth Kazekage of the Hidden Sand Village at a young age.
He was captured by the Akatsuki and had Shukaku extracted from him.
He was revived through the sacrifice of Elder Chiyo.
He became a respected leader and played a major role in the Fourth Great Ninja War as commander of the Allied Shinobi Forces.

Minato Namikaze.quote: Believing in your child is a parent's duty.
lore: He was known throughout the ninja world as the Yellow Flash of the Leaf.
He was the student of Jiraiya, one of the Legendary Sannin.
He created the Rasengan, a powerful chakra-based technique.
He married Kushina Uzumaki and became the father of Naruto Uzumaki.
He was chosen as the Fourth Hokage due to his exceptional skill and leadership.
During the Nine-Tails attack on the Hidden Leaf Village, he fought Obito Uchiha.
He sealed half of Kurama, the Nine-Tailed Fox, inside Naruto to protect the village.
He sacrificed his life alongside Kushina during the Nine-Tails attack.
He was later reincarnated through the Edo Tensei technique during the Fourth Great Ninja War.
He fought alongside Naruto and the Allied Shinobi Forces before finally being laid to rest.

Jiraiya.quote: A person grows up when he's able to overcome hardships. Protection is important, but there are some things a person must learn on their own.
lore: He was one of the Legendary Sannin of the Hidden Leaf Village.
He trained under the Third Hokage, Hiruzen Sarutobi.
He was the teacher of Minato Namikaze, the Fourth Hokage.
He later became the mentor of Naruto Uzumaki.
He traveled the world gathering information as a highly skilled spy.
He was known for his powerful Toad Summoning techniques and Sage Mode.
He wrote the popular 'Make-Out' novel series under a pen name.
He believed that Naruto was the Child of Prophecy who would change the world.
He infiltrated the Hidden Rain Village to investigate the leader of the Akatsuki.
He sacrificed his life fighting the Six Paths of Pain and left behind crucial information that helped Naruto defeat them.

Tsunade Senju.quote: People become stronger because they have things they cannot forget.
lore: She is the granddaughter of Hashirama Senju, the First Hokage.
She is one of the Legendary Sannin alongside Jiraiya and Orochimaru.
She was trained by the Third Hokage, Hiruzen Sarutobi.
She became the greatest medical ninja of her generation.
She introduced the rule that every ninja squad should include a medical ninja.
She developed immense chakra-enhanced strength capable of shattering buildings with a single punch.
She suffered great personal losses, including her brother Nawaki and her lover Dan.
She overcame her fear of blood and returned to serve the Hidden Leaf Village.
She became the Fifth Hokage and helped rebuild the village after major attacks.
She played a crucial role in the Fourth Great Ninja War by healing and supporting the Allied Shinobi Forces.

Orochimaru.quote: Perhaps the meaning of life is found in the countless possibilities of growth.
lore: He was one of the Legendary Sannin of the Hidden Leaf Village.
He trained under the Third Hokage, Hiruzen Sarutobi.
He was once considered a candidate to become the Fourth Hokage.
He became obsessed with learning every jutsu in existence.
He conducted forbidden experiments in pursuit of immortality.
His actions led him to abandon the Hidden Leaf Village and become a rogue ninja.
He founded the Hidden Sound Village and gathered many followers.
He took Sasuke Uchiha as his student in an attempt to obtain the Sharingan.
He played a major role in the Fourth Great Ninja War after being revived.
After the war, he remained under surveillance while continuing his research and assisting the village when needed.

Hinata Hyuga.quote: I never go back on my word, because that's my ninja way too.
lore: She is the eldest daughter of Hiashi Hyuga, the head of the Hyuga clan.
She inherited the Byakugan, one of the most powerful dojutsu in the ninja world.
She was a member of Team 8 alongside Kiba Inuzuka and Shino Aburame.
She trained extensively in the Gentle Fist fighting style of the Hyuga clan.
She admired Naruto Uzumaki from childhood because of his determination and kindness.
She fought courageously against Neji Hyuga during the Chunin Exams.
She risked her life to protect Naruto during Pain's attack on the Hidden Leaf Village.
She played an important role in supporting Naruto during the Fourth Great Ninja War.
She eventually married Naruto Uzumaki.
She became the mother of Boruto Uzumaki and Himawari Uzumaki.
He is the son of Shikaku Nara, the leader of the Nara clan.
He was a member of Team 10 alongside Choji Akimichi and Ino Yamanaka.
He is known for his exceptionally high intelligence and strategic thinking.
He was the only Konoha ninja promoted to Chunin during the Chunin Exams.
He inherited and mastered the Nara clan's Shadow Possession techniques.
He led the mission to retrieve Sasuke Uchiha after Sasuke left the village.
He avenged his mentor Asuma Sarutobi by helping defeat Hidan of the Akatsuki.
He served as a key strategist during the Fourth Great Ninja War.
He married Temari of the Hidden Sand Village and became the father of Shikadai Nara.
He became Naruto Uzumaki's trusted advisor and later the Eighth Hokage of the Hidden Leaf Village.

Madara Uchiha.quote: Wake up to reality! Nothing ever goes as planned in this accursed world.
lore: He was one of the founders of the Hidden Leaf Village alongside Hashirama Senju.
He was the leader of the Uchiha clan during the Warring States Period.
He possessed the Eternal Mangekyo Sharingan, granting him immense power.
He fought Hashirama Senju in the legendary battle at the Valley of the End.
He survived his apparent death by using Izanagi and continued his plans in secret.
He awakened the Rinnegan late in his life by combining Uchiha and Senju chakra.
He manipulated Obito Uchiha into carrying out the Eye of the Moon Plan.
He was revived during the Fourth Great Ninja War and became one of its greatest threats.
He became the Ten-Tails Jinchuriki and achieved power rivaling the Sage of Six Paths.
His plans ultimately failed when Black Zetsu betrayed him, leading to Kaguya Otsutsuki's resurrection.

Obito Uchiha.quote: The moment people come to know love, they run the risk of carrying hate.
lore: He was a member of Team Minato alongside Kakashi Hatake and Rin Nohara.
He dreamed of becoming Hokage and helping others.
He gifted his left Sharingan to Kakashi after being crushed during a mission.
He was rescued by Madara Uchiha and nursed back to health.
The death of Rin Nohara deeply traumatized him and changed his worldview.
He adopted the identity of 'Madara Uchiha' and secretly manipulated events from the shadows.
He controlled the Nine-Tailed Fox and launched the attack on the Hidden Leaf Village.
He led the Akatsuki and initiated the Fourth Great Ninja War.
He became the Ten-Tails Jinchuriki and gained immense power.
He ultimately redeemed himself by helping Naruto and Kakashi defeat Kaguya, sacrificing his life to protect his friends.

Hashirama Senju.quote: The village is not something that belongs to one person. It belongs to everyone who lives in it.
lore: He was the leader of the Senju clan during the Warring States Period.
He co-founded the Hidden Leaf Village alongside Madara Uchiha.
He became the First Hokage of Konohagakure.
He was known as the 'God of Shinobi' due to his unparalleled strength.
He possessed the unique Wood Release kekkei genkai, allowing him to create and control wood.
He could suppress and control Tailed Beasts using his powerful chakra.
He fought Madara Uchiha multiple times, including their legendary battle at the Valley of the End.
He believed deeply in peace and cooperation between clans.
He was the grandfather of Tsunade, the Fifth Hokage.
His cells became highly sought after because of their extraordinary regenerative abilities and were used in many experiments long after his death.

Tobirama Senju.quote: It is not wise to judge others based on your own preconceptions and by their appearances.
lore: He was the younger brother of Hashirama Senju, the First Hokage.
He became the Second Hokage of the Hidden Leaf Village after Hashirama.
He was renowned for his intelligence, leadership, and mastery of Water Release techniques.
He created many powerful jutsu, including the Flying Thunder God Technique.
He also invented the Shadow Clone Jutsu and the Edo Tensei technique.
He established the Konoha Ninja Academy to train future generations of shinobi.
He founded the Chunin Exams to promote cooperation and competition among villages.
He created the Konoha Military Police Force and assigned its leadership to the Uchiha clan.
He served as the mentor of Hiruzen Sarutobi, who later became the Third Hokage.
He sacrificed his life during a mission to ensure the survival of his comrades and the future of the village.

Might Guy.quote: The power of youth is boundless!
lore: He is the son of Might Duy, a shinobi famous for mastering the Eight Inner Gates.
He specialized in taijutsu because he could not effectively use ninjutsu or genjutsu.
He became one of Konoha's strongest shinobi through relentless training and determination.
He was Kakashi Hatake's lifelong rival and close friend.
He served as the leader of Team Guy, mentoring Neji Hyuga, Rock Lee, and Tenten.
He trained Rock Lee to become a powerful taijutsu specialist.
He mastered all Eight Inner Gates, a forbidden technique that greatly increases physical power.
During the Fourth Great Ninja War, he opened the Eighth Gate of Death to battle Madara Uchiha.
His attack, Night Guy, severely injured Ten-Tails Jinchuriki Madara, earning Madara's respect.
He survived the use of the Eighth Gate thanks to Naruto's intervention and continued to inspire future generations despite losing the use of his legs.

Might Guy.name: Rock Lee
Might Guy.quote: A dropout will beat a genius through hard work.
lore: He was a member of Team Guy alongside Neji Hyuga and Tenten.
He was unable to use ninjutsu or genjutsu, making him different from most shinobi.
He trained under Might Guy, who became his mentor and role model.
He dedicated himself entirely to taijutsu and intense physical training.
He became famous for his incredible speed and hand-to-hand combat skills.
During the Chunin Exams, he impressed many by fighting Gaara and opening several of the Inner Gates.
He suffered severe injuries from his battle with Gaara and was told he might never fight again.
He underwent a risky operation performed by Tsunade and returned to active duty.
He fought bravely in the Fourth Great Ninja War alongside the Allied Shinobi Forces.
Through perseverance and determination, he proved that hard work can rival natural talent.

Might Guy.name: Neji Hyuga
Might Guy.quote: Fear. That is what we live with. And we live it every day.
lore: He was a member of Team Guy alongside Rock Lee and Tenten.
He belonged to the branch family of the Hyuga clan.
He was considered a prodigy and one of the most talented shinobi of his generation.
He mastered the Gentle Fist fighting style and the Byakugan.
He initially believed that a person's destiny could not be changed.
He fought Hinata Hyuga during the Chunin Exams and defeated her.
He later battled Naruto Uzumaki, who challenged his beliefs about fate.
Naruto's determination inspired Neji to change his outlook on life.
He became a Jonin and served with distinction in the Hidden Leaf Village.
During the Fourth Great Ninja War, he sacrificed his life to protect Naruto Uzumaki and Hinata Hyuga, fulfilling his own chosen destiny.

Might Guy.name: Ino Yamanaka
Might Guy.quote: Even a flower can bloom again if given a chance.
lore: She is the daughter of Inoichi Yamanaka, the leader of the Yamanaka clan.
She was a member of Team 10 alongside Shikamaru Nara and Choji Akimichi.
She was once Sakura Haruno's closest friend before becoming her rival.
She inherited the Yamanaka clan's secret Mind Transfer techniques.
She participated in the Chunin Exams and demonstrated her clan's unique abilities.
She trained to become a skilled medical ninja in addition to her clan techniques.
She played an important role in communication and intelligence gathering during the Fourth Great Ninja War.
She succeeded her father as the leader of the Yamanaka clan.
She married Sai and became the mother of Inojin Yamanaka.
She continues to serve the Hidden Leaf Village through its sensory and intelligence divisions.

Might Guy.name: Choji Akimichi
Might Guy.quote: You can say whatever you want about me, but don't insult my friends.
lore: He is the son of Choza Akimichi, the leader of the Akimichi clan.
He was a member of Team 10 alongside Shikamaru Nara and Ino Yamanaka.
He is known for his kind heart and strong loyalty to his friends.
He inherited the Akimichi clan's secret Expansion Jutsu techniques.
He can convert calories into chakra to dramatically increase his size and strength.
He developed powerful techniques such as the Human Boulder and Butterfly Mode.
He participated in the Sasuke Retrieval Mission and risked his life for his teammates.
He played a significant role in the Fourth Great Ninja War as part of the Allied Shinobi Forces.
He overcame his insecurities and grew into a confident and capable shinobi.
He later married Karui of the Hidden Cloud Village and became the father of Chocho Akimichi.

Might Guy.name: Kiba Inuzuka
Might Guy.quote: I'm going to become Hokage someday too!
lore: He is a member of the Inuzuka clan, known for fighting alongside ninja dogs.
He was a member of Team 8 alongside Hinata Hyuga and Shino Aburame.
His loyal canine partner is Akamaru, who has been with him since childhood.
He possesses an exceptional sense of smell and heightened physical abilities.
He uses the Inuzuka clan's Beast Mimicry techniques to fight in coordination with Akamaru.
He participated in the Chunin Exams and faced Naruto Uzumaki in the preliminary rounds.
He joined the Sasuke Retrieval Mission and fought Sakon and Ukon of the Sound Four.
He continued to develop powerful combination techniques with Akamaru as he matured.
He fought alongside the Allied Shinobi Forces during the Fourth Great Ninja War.
He remains a dedicated shinobi of the Hidden Leaf Village and often dreams of becoming Hokage.

Might Guy.name: Shino Aburame
Might Guy.quote: A true victory is achieved when one remains calm and analyzes the situation.
lore: He is a member of the Aburame clan, a family that forms a symbiotic bond with chakra-eating insects.
He was a member of Team 8 alongside Hinata Hyuga and Kiba Inuzuka.
His body houses kikaichu insects, which he uses for combat, tracking, and reconnaissance.
He is known for his calm personality, intelligence, and analytical thinking.
He participated in the Chunin Exams and defeated Zaku Abumi in the preliminary rounds.
He was unable to join the Sasuke Retrieval Mission and was disappointed to be left behind.
His insects allow him to gather information and locate targets over long distances.
He fought as part of the Allied Shinobi Forces during the Fourth Great Ninja War.
After the war, he became an instructor at the Hidden Leaf Village's Ninja Academy.
Despite often being overlooked by others, he remains one of Konoha's most reliable and skilled shinobi.

Might Guy.name: Temari
Might Guy.quote: Being a woman doesn't make me weak.
lore: She is the eldest child of the Fourth Kazekage of the Hidden Sand Village.
She is the older sister of Gaara and Kankuro.
She was one of the strongest participants in the Chunin Exams.
She specializes in Wind Release techniques and fights using a giant iron fan.
She easily defeated Tenten during the Chunin Exams preliminary matches.
She assisted Shikamaru Nara during the Sasuke Retrieval Mission.
She became a respected diplomat between the Hidden Sand and Hidden Leaf Villages.
She fought alongside the Allied Shinobi Forces during the Fourth Great Ninja War.
She developed a close relationship with Shikamaru Nara and later married him.
She became the mother of Shikadai Nara and continued serving as one of the Hidden Sand Village's most powerful kunoichi.

Might Guy.name: Killer Bee
Might Guy.quote: Yo, fool! Ya fool!
lore: He is the adopted brother of the Fourth Raikage of the Hidden Cloud Village.
He became the jinchuriki of Gyuki, the Eight-Tailed Beast.
Unlike many jinchuriki, he formed a friendship and partnership with his Tailed Beast.
He is famous for speaking and fighting with an unusual rap style.
He is a master swordsman capable of wielding multiple swords simultaneously.
He trained Naruto Uzumaki to control the power of Kurama, the Nine-Tailed Fox.
He successfully resisted several attempts by the Akatsuki to capture him.
He fought alongside the Allied Shinobi Forces during the Fourth Great Ninja War.
He played a crucial role in battles against Obito Uchiha and Madara Uchiha.
He remains one of the strongest shinobi in the Hidden Cloud Village and a symbol of harmony between humans and Tailed Beasts.

Might Guy.name: Pain (Nagato)
Might Guy.quote: Sometimes you must hurt in order to know, fall in order to grow, lose in order to gain.
lore: He was born as Nagato, a member of the Uzumaki clan.
He awakened the Rinnegan, one of the most powerful dojutsu in the ninja world.
He was trained by Jiraiya alongside Yahiko and Konan.
He and his friends founded the Akatsuki with the goal of bringing peace to the world.
After Yahiko's death, Nagato adopted the identity of 'Pain' and pursued peace through fear and suffering.
He controlled six different bodies known as the Six Paths of Pain.
He led the Akatsuki and orchestrated the capture of multiple Tailed Beasts.
He destroyed much of the Hidden Leaf Village using the devastating Shinra Tensei technique.
After speaking with Naruto Uzumaki, he regained faith in Jiraiya's vision of peace.
He sacrificed his life to revive the villagers and shinobi who had died during the attack on Konoha.

Might Guy.name: Konan
Might Guy.quote: The feelings that have grown from love become a flower of hope that never dies.
lore: She was one of the founding members of the original Akatsuki.
She grew up as an orphan in the Hidden Rain Village alongside Yahiko and Nagato.
She was trained by Jiraiya, who taught her the basics of ninjutsu.
She developed a unique Paper Ninjutsu that allowed her to transform her body into sheets of paper.
She served as Nagato's closest ally and supporter throughout his life.
After Yahiko's death, she remained loyal to Nagato and helped lead the Akatsuki.
She could create wings, weapons, and massive structures from paper.
After Nagato's death, she left the Akatsuki and sought to honor his and Yahiko's dream of peace.
She prepared an enormous paper bomb trap in an attempt to stop Obito Uchiha.
She sacrificed her life protecting Nagato's Rinnegan and remained faithful to her friends' ideals until the end.

Might Guy.name: Deidara
Might Guy.quote: Art is an explosion!
lore: He was originally a shinobi from the Hidden Stone Village.
He possessed mouths in the palms of his hands that could knead chakra into explosive clay.
He believed that true art was found in a single, magnificent moment of destruction.
He was recruited into the Akatsuki after being defeated by Itachi Uchiha.
He was partnered with Sasori and later with Tobi in the Akatsuki.
He specialized in creating explosive clay creatures such as birds, spiders, and dragons.
He successfully captured Gaara, the One-Tail Jinchuriki, for the Akatsuki.
He developed a deep rivalry with the Sharingan and particularly hated Itachi.
He fought Sasuke Uchiha in a fierce battle and pushed himself to his limits.
He ultimately sacrificed himself using his ultimate technique, C0, in an attempt to defeat Sasuke.

Might Guy.name: Sasori
Might Guy.quote: True beauty lies in things that last forever.
lore: He was a shinobi from the Hidden Sand Village and a member of the Akatsuki.
He was the grandson of Chiyo, one of the most respected puppet masters in Sunagakure.
He became famous for creating highly advanced puppets and deadly poisons.
He crafted the puppet versions of his parents after they died, seeking to ease his loneliness.
He transformed his own body into a puppet to achieve a form of immortality.
He created the Third Kazekage puppet, one of his most powerful human puppets.
He partnered with Deidara in the Akatsuki organization.
He used the Red Secret Technique: Performance of a Hundred Puppets to overwhelm enemies.
He fought Sakura Haruno and Chiyo in a legendary battle.
He ultimately allowed himself to be defeated, finding peace through the memories of his parents.

Might Guy.name: Kisame Hoshigaki
Might Guy.quote: Truth is only revealed when one reaches the brink of death.
lore: He was a shinobi from the Hidden Mist Village and a member of the Akatsuki.
He was known as the 'Monster of the Hidden Mist' because of his immense chakra reserves and brutal fighting style.
He wielded Samehada, a living sword that absorbs chakra from opponents.
He was partnered with Itachi Uchiha in the Akatsuki.
He specialized in powerful Water Release techniques capable of creating vast bodies of water.
He could fuse with Samehada, greatly enhancing his strength and chakra absorption abilities.
He played a major role in capturing Tailed Beasts for the Akatsuki.
He infiltrated the Hidden Leaf Village alongside Itachi to pursue Naruto Uzumaki.
He battled Killer Bee and the Allied Shinobi Forces during the Fourth Great Ninja War.
To protect the Akatsuki's secrets, he chose death over capture and remained loyal to his ideals until the end.

Might Guy.name: Hidan
Might Guy.quote: Now! Let's savor the utmost of suffering together!
lore: He was a rogue ninja from Yugakure and one of the latest members to join the Akatsuki.
He was a devout follower of the Lord Jashin religion, which demands absolute destruction and slaughter.
He possessed a unique form of absolute immortality, allowing him to survive fatal wounds, including decapitation.
He was partnered with Kakuzu, forming an Akatsuki duo mockingly dubbed the 'Zombie Combo'.
He utilized a massive Triple-Bladed Scythe designed not to kill, but to draw the opponent's blood for his rituals.
By ingesting a victim's blood and drawing a Jashin symbol on the ground, he could link his body to theirs like a voodoo doll.
Once the ritual link was active, any damage inflicted on Hidan's body was mirrored directly onto his victim.
He was responsible for the death of Asuma Sarutobi, killing him during a confrontation with Konoha's Twenty Squads.
He was outsmarted by Shikamaru Nara, who lured him into the Nara Clan Forest and blew him to pieces with explosive tags.
He was buried alive deep underground in a pit, where he was left to slowly die of starvation.

Might Guy.name: Kakuzu
Might Guy.quote: Even Hell runs on money. I'd be just fine.
lore: He was a rogue ninja from Takigakure and one of the oldest living shinobi.
He fled his village after being imprisoned for failing a mission to assassinate the First Hokage.
He utilized a forbidden jutsu called Earth Grudge Fear, transforming his body into a mass of black threads.
He was practically immortal, maintaining up to five hearts taken from powerful shinobi, allowing him to use all five basic nature transformations.
He was partnered with Hidan, forming the Akatsuki's 'Zombie Combo', and frequently collected bounties.
He possessed a violent temper and had killed all of his previous Akatsuki partners before being paired with the immortal Hidan.
He killed Asuma Sarutobi's teammate, Chiriku, and collected the massive bounty on his head.
During his battle against Team 10 and Kakashi Hatake, he lost his hearts one by one to a variety of elemental counters.
His remaining hearts were utterly destroyed when Naruto Uzumaki hit him with the newly perfected Wind Release: Rasenshuriken.
He was later reincarnated by Kabuto Yakushi during the Fourth Great Ninja War, where he fought until his soul was sealed.

Might Guy.name: Sai
Might Guy.quote: A smile is the best way to get oneself out of a tight spot, even if it is a fake one.
lore: He was an orphan recruited into Root, a secret, ruthless sub-division of Konoha's ANBU.
As part of his Root training, he was conditioned to strip away all personal emotions.
He specialized in Super Beast Imitating Drawing, a unique jutsu that allows him to bring ink-painted animals to life.
He was assigned to Team Kakashi as Sasuke Uchiha's replacement.
He carried a blank picture book that he originally intended to fill with drawings of his adoptive brother, Shin.
His initial bluntness caused severe friction with Naruto Uzumaki and Sakura Haruno.
Through observing Naruto's bond with Sasuke, he rediscovered his own emotions and broke free from Danzo's emotional conditioning.
During the Fourth Great Ninja War, he served in the Surprise Attack Division and used his emotional awakening to unleash powerful ink sealing jutsu.
He fought alongside the Allied Shinobi Forces, using his ink-painted birds to provide crucial aerial reconnaissance.
In the years following the war, he married Ino Yamanaka, took her clan name, and became the Director of the ANBU under the Seventh Hokage.

Might Guy.name: Yamato
Might Guy.quote: I like to be a nice guy, but if push comes to shove... I'm a terror.
lore: He was an orphan kidnapped as a child by Orochimaru to serve as one of sixty test subjects injected with the First Hokage's DNA.
He was the sole survivor of those experiments, granting him the rare ability to use the legendary Wood Release jutsu.
He graduated from the Academy at age six, became a Chunin, and eventually joined the ANBU, serving under Kakashi Hatake.
He was assigned to lead Team Kakashi as a temporary replacement under the codename 'Yamato'.
His primary mission was to use his Wood Release to suppress the Nine-Tails' chakra whenever Naruto lost control.
He relied on psychological tactics to keep Team Kakashi in line, famously using a terrifying glare to intimidate Naruto.
He helped Naruto create his own ultimate jutsu, using Wood Release to construct training grounds.
He was captured before the Fourth Great Ninja War by Kabuto Yakushi, who used Yamato's Hashirama cells to power up the White Zetsu Army.
During the war, his body was used as a catalyst inside Tobi's giant Wood Release statue to fight against the Allied Shinobi Forces.
After being freed from the Infinite Tsukuyomi, he was later tasked by Konoha with keeping a permanent, watchful eye on Orochimaru.

Might Guy.name: Asuma Sarutobi
Might Guy.quote: The 'king' isn't the Hokage. It's the children who will lead the next generation... They are the ones we must protect.
lore: He was a powerful Jonin of Konohagakure, the son of the Third Hokage Hiruzen Sarutobi, and the leader of Team 10.
In his youth, he had a falling out with his father and briefly left the village to become one of the Twelve Guardian Shinobi.
He possessed a massive bounty of 35 million Ryo on his head.
He specialized in close-quarters combat using trench-knife style Chakra Blades infused with his highly refined Wind Release chakra.
He shared a deep, unspoken romantic relationship with Kurenai Yuhi, which resulted in her becoming pregnant with his child.
He acted as a vital mentor to Shikamaru Nara, helping him realize his true tactical brilliance.
He led the Twenty Squads mission to hunt down Akatsuki members invading Fire Country.
He was tragically killed in battle after falling victim to Hidan's lethal Jashin ritual curse.
With his final breaths, he passed on his will of fire to Team 10, revealing to Shikamaru who the true 'king' of the village is.
He was reincarnated during the Fourth Great Ninja War, forcing a heartbreaking emotional confrontation where his former students had to defeat and seal him.

Might Guy.name: Kurenai Yuhi
Might Guy.quote: You've grown so strong... But don't shoulder everything alone. Lean on those who care about you.
lore: She was a highly skilled Kunoichi of Konohagakure who was promoted to Jonin status shortly before taking leadership of Team 8.
She was widely recognized as Konoha's premier genjutsu prodigy.
She served as a protective mentor and maternal figure to Hinata Hyuga.
She specialized in illusions, most notably her signature Demonic Illusion: Tree Bind Death.
She was among the first Konoha shinobi to confront Itachi Uchiha and Kisame Hoshigaki when they infiltrated the village.
She shared a deeply devoted romantic relationship with Asuma Sarutobi.
Following Asuma's tragic death at the hands of the Akatsuki, she retired from active ninja duty due to her pregnancy.
She gave birth to a daughter named Mirai Sarutobi, raising her as a single mother while keeping Asuma's memory and ideals alive.
During the pain invasion and subsequent crises, she was fiercely protected by Shikamaru Nara.
In the peaceful years after the Fourth Great Ninja War, she lived quietly in Konoha, watching her daughter grow.

Might Guy.name: Boruto Uzumaki
Might Guy.quote: I'm going to follow my own ninja path! I want to be a shinobi like Lord Sasuke!
lore: He is the firstborn child of Naruto Uzumaki and Hinata Hyuga.
He initially resented his father's role as Hokage due to the neglect it caused his family.
He cheated in the Chunin Exams using the scientific ninja tool Kote, leading to a public disqualification by his father.
He was marked with a Karma seal by Momoshiki Otsutsuki, turning his body into a vessel for the alien entity's resurrection.
He trained under Sasuke Uchiha, adopting his master's style and fighting philosophy.
He developed the Vanishing Rasengan, adding a subconscious lightning-nature transformation.
He became a target of the global community after Eida's Omnipotence swapped his life history with Kawaki's.
He spent three years training in exile with Sasuke, perfecting his kenjutsu and mastering advanced Otsutsuki powers.
He created the devastating Rasengan: Uzuhiko, utilizing the planet's rotation and centrifugal force.
He returned to Konoha as a rogue savior, fighting to protect his homeland.

Might Guy.name: Sarada Uchiha
Might Guy.quote: My dream is to become the Hokage! A path where I can connect with everyone!
lore: She is the daughter of Sasuke Uchiha and Sakura Haruno.
She grew up with an absent father, leading her to briefly question her lineage.
She awakened her basic Sharingan at a young age out of emotional excitement.
She serves as the tactical anchor of Team 7, frequently strategizing during high-stakes battles.
She mastered the Chidori under her father's guidance.
She possesses monstrous physical strength, mimicking her mother's ability to focus chakra.
She was one of the very few individuals unaffected by Eida's reality-altering Omnipotence jutsu.
She awakened her Mangekyo Sharingan out of intense grief and a desperate plea to save Boruto.
She spent the three-year timeskip lobbying the Eighth Hokage, Shikamaru Nara, to clear Boruto's name.
She achieved the rank of Chunin and stepped into a leadership role among the village's youth.

Might Guy.name: Mitsuki
Might Guy.quote: Boruto... You are my sun. You illuminate my path and keep me whole.
lore: He is a synthetic human created by Orochimaru, engineered to be genetically perfect.
He left Otogakure to seek out Boruto Uzumaki, whom he views as his 'sun'.
He possesses an innate, highly advanced Sage Transformation that manifests as a green, serpentine chakra shroud.
His Sage Mode is so powerful that its premature use severely damages his internal organs.
He can extend and contort his limbs using Soft Physique Modification.
He speaks to white snakes to gather information, communicate with Orochimaru, and track targets.
He was deeply affected by Omnipotence, which led him to mistake Kawaki for his true sun.
He hunted Boruto down during the timeskip, unleashing his full Sage Mode in a relentless assassination attempt.
He realized Boruto's true identity after noticing the distinct, warm nature of his fighting style.
He remains a core member of Team 7, resolving to find his own independent will.

Might Guy.name: Konohamaru Sarutobi
Might Guy.quote: There are no shortcuts to becoming Hokage! It's a long, hard road that you have to walk yourself!
lore: He is the grandson of the Third Hokage and the nephew of Asuma, named after the village itself by his grandfather.
He spent his early childhood throwing tantrums and attacking his grandfather to gain recognition outside of his royal status.
He became Naruto's first disciple, learning the Rasengan and the infamous Sexy Jutsu from him at a remarkably young age.
He defeated the Naraka Path of Pain during the village assault, a legendary feat for a Genin-level shinobi.
He inherited the summoning contract with monkeys, regularly calling upon Enra to aid him in barrier and physical combat.
He rose to the rank of Jonin and took up the mantle of leading the new generation's Team 7 (Boruto, Sarada, and Mitsuki).
He highly values the traditional Will of Fire, constantly acting as a protective older brother figure to Naruto's children.
He mastered multiple nature transformations, specializing in expansive Fire Release techniques like the Burning Ash jutsu.
He struggled with his duties when his team was torn apart by the geopolitical shifts caused by Kara and Otsutsuki activity.
He serves as a close advisor and bodyguard to the Hokage's office, still firmly pursuing his ultimate dream of becoming Hokage.

Might Guy.name: Iruka Umino
Might Guy.quote: He's not the Nine-Tails Fox anymore. He is Naruto Uzumaki of Konohagakure... and he is my precious student.
lore: He lost both of his parents during the Nine-Tails' attack on Konoha, leading to a lonely, attention-seeking childhood.
He initially struggled to look at Naruto without seeing the beast that killed his parents, but chose empathy over hatred.
He was the very first person to acknowledge Naruto as a human being, saving him from Mizuki's manipulation and death.
He gave Naruto his first headband, officially graduating him into the ninja world and kickstarting his entire journey.
He served as the bedrock of the Ninja Academy, guiding multiple generations of genin with patience and strict love.
He was chosen by Naruto to stand in as his father during his wedding ceremony with Hinata Hyuga.
He used a powerful sealing barrier to temporarily restrain Naruto during the Fourth Great Ninja War to keep him safe.
He has a massive appetite for ramen, frequently treating Naruto to Ichiraku Ramen to celebrate his milestones or cheer him up.
He eventually rose to become the Headmaster of the Ninja Academy, modernizing the curriculum for a peaceful era.
He remains one of the most respected figures in Konoha, acting as a voice of wisdom whenever Naruto faces emotional burnout.

Might Guy.name: Shisui Uchiha
Might Guy.quote: Self-sacrifice... A nameless shinobi who protects peace from within its shadow. That is the true mark of a ninja.
lore: He was a legendary prodigy of the Uchiha clan, renowned across nations as 'Shisui of the Body Flicker' due to his unmatched speed.
He was Itachi Uchiha's best friend and older mentor, heavily influencing Itachi's philosophies regarding peace and sacrifice.
He possessed the ultimate genjutsu, Kotoamatsukami, which could subtly control a target's mind without them realizing it.
He planned to use his Mangekyo Sharingan on Fugaku Uchiha to stop the clan's planned coup d'état against Konoha.
He was ambushed by Danzo Shimura, who poisoned him and stole his right eye to hoard the power of Kotoamatsukami.
He escaped the ambush and met with Itachi, entrusting his remaining left eye to his friend to keep it safe from Danzo.
He committed suicide by throwing himself off a cliff into the Naka River, orchestrating his death to awaken Itachi's Mangekyo Sharingan.
He wiped out his own physical existence so thoroughly that Kabuto Yakushi could never find a DNA sample to reanimate him.
His stolen right eye was used by Danzo during the Five Kage Summit to manipulate the leader of the Land of Iron.
His left eye, hidden inside Naruto's crow, eventually freed Itachi from Kabuto's absolute reanimation control during the war.

Might Guy.name: Kushina Uzumaki
Might Guy.quote: Thank you for letting me be your mother... and for letting Minato be your father... Thank you for being born to us!
lore: She was born in Uzushio and brought to Konoha as a child specifically because her special chakra could suppress the Nine-Tails.
She was bullied in school for her vibrant red hair and round face, earning the nickname 'Tomato' before beating up her bullies.
She fell in love with Minato Namikaze after he traced her red hair to rescue her from Cloud Village kidnappers.
She earned the terrifying moniker 'The Red Hot-Blooded Habanero' due to her short temper and aggressive fighting style.
She possessed the Uzumaki clan's signature Adamantine Sealing Chains, which were strong enough to restrain a full Tailed Beast.
Her seal weakened during childbirth, allowing masked Tobi to extract the Nine-Tails and unleash it upon Konoha.
She survived the extraction momentarily due to her immense Uzumaki vitality, using her remaining strength to chain the fox down.
She sacrificed her life alongside Minato, taking a massive claw through the chest to shield their newborn son, Naruto.
She sealed a portion of her conscious chakra inside Naruto, appearing years later to help him tame the Nine-Tailed Fox's power.
She passed on her unique verbal tic, 'Dattebane' (Believe it/Ya know), which Naruto inherited as his signature 'Dattebayo'.

Might Guy.name: Suigetsu Hozuki
Might Guy.quote: The younger brother beats the older brother... That's how things work in the sword world.
lore: He was a prodigy from Kirigakure who was captured by Orochimaru and kept in a fluid tube for extensive genetic experiments.
He was recruited by Sasuke Uchiha as the first member of the team Hebi (later Taka) due to his incredible combat skills.
He belongs to the Hozuki clan, allowing him to instantly liquefy his entire body using the Hydrification Technique.
He must constantly consume water to stay hydrated, otherwise his liquid form becomes sluggish and easily dried out.
He is highly vulnerable to Lightning Release, which paralyzes his fluid body and prevents him from liquefying.
He tracked down Zabuza's grave to claim the Kubikiribocho (Executioner's Blade), beginning his quest to collect all seven swords of the Mist.
He can bulk up his muscle mass by directing fluid into his limbs, allowing him to swing massive weapons with ease.
He fought Killer Bee alongside Taka, taking a direct Tailed Beast Bomb to save his comrades from total annihilation.
He discovered a hidden scroll in Orochimaru's hideout that held secrets to changing the tide of the Fourth Great Ninja War.
In the post-war era, he returned to working as a lab assistant for Orochimaru, occasionally running errands for Otogakure.

Might Guy.name: Karin
Might Guy.quote: If you're going to use me, use me until the very end... Sasuke.
lore: She lived as a refugee in Kusagakure, where her mother died from over-exploitation due to her unique healing abilities.
She was saved by Sasuke Uchiha during the Chunin Exams in the Forest of Death, sparking a lifelong obsession with him.
She was recruited by Sasuke to lead Team Hebi's sensory tracking due to her elite ability to read and evaluate chakra signatures.
Her signature technique, Mind's Eye of the Kagura, allows her to track targets across miles and sense changes in emotion.
She heals others by letting them bite into her skin and suck her chakra, leaving her body covered in bite marks.
She was used as a human shield by Sasuke during his fight with Danzo, being pierced through the chest just to kill the target.
She forgave Sasuke almost immediately after he apologized, showcasing her intense, bordering on toxic, devotion to him.
During the war, she manifested the Uzumaki clan's Adamantine Attacking Chains out of rage to smash Tobi's wooden statue.
She personally delivered Sakura's baby, Sarada Uchiha, in one of Orochimaru's hideouts, acting as a trusted family friend.
She currently manages Orochimaru's Southern Hideout, keeping Sasuke's old glasses as a keepsake while fully supporting his marriage.

Might Guy.name: Jugo
Might Guy.quote: I don't want to kill anyone anymore... but the impulse keeps tearing me apart from the inside.
lore: He belongs to an unnamed clan that naturally absorbs natural energy, causing uncontrollable fits of homicidal madness.
He voluntarily sought out Orochimaru to find a cure for his rage, inadvertently providing the genetic source for the Curse Mark.
He formed a profound bond with Kimimaro Kaguya, who was the only person capable of subduing his rage without harming him.
He joined Sasuke's team Taka solely because he viewed Sasuke as Kimimaro's spiritual successor and genetic savior.
His Sage Transformation allows him to shapeshift his limbs into axes, shields, jet boosters, or cannons depending on the battle.
He possesses the unique ability to communicate fluently with birds and other woodland animals to scout out paths.
He can transfer his own flesh and chakra to heal compatible individuals like Sasuke, though doing so shrinks his physical age.
He spent major portions of his life locked in isolated prison cells to protect innocent people from his berserk states.
He fought alongside Sasuke during the Summit and War arcs, serving as armor or heavy artillery whenever Taka engaged enemies.
He returned to living in nature under Orochimaru's loose supervision, struggling daily to maintain his inner zen peace.

Might Guy.name: Kimimaro
Might Guy.quote: It doesn't matter if I die. I am not alone... I live on inside Lord Orochimaru's heart forever.
lore: He was the sole survivor of the bloodthirsty Kaguya clan, who locked him in a cage due to their fear of his extreme abilities.
He was found and adopted by Orochimaru, developing a fierce, religious devotion to the Sannin as his life's true purpose.
He possessed the rare Kekkei Genkai Shikotsumyaku, allowing him to manipulate his skeletal structure to use bones as weapons.
He was the original intended vessel for Orochimaru's soul before a rare, incurable lung disease ruined his health.
He led the Sound Four, easily beating them into submission to ensure their compliance in retrieving Sasuke Uchiha.
He forced his dying body to move through sheer willpower and Curse Mark chakra to fight Naruto, Lee, and Gaara.
His ultimate technique, Dance of the Seedling Fern, created a massive forest of jagged bone spikes rising out of the earth.
He died mid-strike from his illness just a millimeter away from piercing Gaara's eye, remaining undefeated in actual combat.
His death forced Orochimaru to wait years for another chance at the Sharingan, altering the trajectory of Sasuke's growth.
He was reanimated during the Fourth Great Ninja War, using his bone blades to cut through samurai divisions until the jutsu broke.

Might Guy.name: Zabuza Momochi
Might Guy.quote: Your words cut deep... deeper than any blade. If possible... I want to go to the same place as you, Haku.
lore: He was known as the 'Demon of the Hidden Mist' after slaughtering over a hundred Academy students as a child to graduate.
He was an elite member of Kirigakure's Seven Ninja Swordsmen, wielding the self-repairing Executioner's Blade.
He staged a failed coup d'état against the Fourth Mizukage, forcing him to flee the village and live as a mercenary.
He took in an orphaned boy named Haku, intending to use him purely as a weapon while hiding his growing affection for him.
He was hired by the corrupt tycoon Gato to assassinate the bridge builder Tazuna, bringing him into conflict with Team 7.
He specialized in Hidden Mist Jutsu combined with Silent Killing, tracking enemies purely through sound and wind shifts.
He was incapacitated by Kakashi Hatake, leading Haku to sacrifice his own life to take a lethal Lightning Blade intended for him.
He was moved to tears by Naruto's emotional speech, turning on Gato and slaughtering his men using only a kunai in his mouth.
He died next to Haku on the Great Naruto Bridge, wishing to join his young partner in whatever afterlife awaited them.
He was reanimated during the war, explicitly thanking Kakashi for stopping him before he could damage his legacy any further.

Might Guy.name: Haku
Might Guy.quote: When a person has something precious they want to protect... that's when they can become truly strong.
lore: He belonged to the Yuki clan, inheriting the Ice Release Kekkei Genkai that combined Water and Wind natures.
He killed his own father in self-defense after his father murdered his mother upon discovering her secret bloodline.
He lived as a starving street orphan before Zabuza Momochi found him and gave him a purpose as his personal weapon.
He possessed a kind, deeply pacifistic nature, frequently holding back in battles to disable targets rather than kill them.
He utilized senbon needles with surgical precision, able to put targets into a temporary, death-like coma instantly.
He could weave jutsu signs using only a single hand, a rare feat that completely shocked Kakashi Hatake.
He trapped Naruto and Sasuke inside his Demonic Mirroring Ice Crystals, pushing Sasuke to awaken his Sharingan.
He threw himself in front of Kakashi's Chidori to shield Zabuza, dying with a smile knowing he was useful to his master.
His pure, unselfish loyalty heavily shaped Naruto's early outlook on what it truly means to be a dedicated shinobi.
He was reanimated alongside Zabuza, feeling immense grief that he had to fight again despite dying to protect his master.

Might Guy.name: Hiruzen Sarutobi
Might Guy.quote: When the tree leaves dance, one shall find flames. The fire's shadow will illuminate the village... and once again, tree leaves shall bud anew.
lore: He was trained directly by the first two Hokage and was named the Third Hokage by Tobirama Senju during a war retreat.
He was hailed as 'The Professor' due to his encyclopedic mastery of every single non-Kekkei Genkai jutsu in Konoha.
He held the office of Hokage longer than anyone else, stepping back into power after Minato Namikaze's tragic death.
He presided over a golden age of peace but struggled heavily with administrative choices, including his handling of Danzo and the Uchiha.
He personally trained the Legendary Sannin: Jiraiya, Orochimaru, and Tsunade, favoring Orochimaru's genius above all.
He could summon the Monkey King: Enma, who transformed into an unbreakable Adamantine Staff for close-quarters fighting.
He defended the village during the Konoha Crush arc, engaging his rogue student Orochimaru in a historic barrier duel.
He used the forbidden Reaper Death Seal to sacrifice his life, sealing the souls of the reanimated first two Hokage.
He permanently crippled Orochimaru's arsenal by sealing the chakra within his student's arms before dying with a peaceful smile.
He was reanimated during the war by Orochimaru, using his all-element mastery to counter Tobi's massive elemental attacks.
