lore: 1. He was known as the 'Demon of the Hidden Mist' after slaughtering over a hundred Academy students as a child to graduate.
2. He was an elite member of Kirigakure's Seven Ninja Swordsmen, wielding the self-repairing Executioner's Blade.
3. He staged a failed coup d'état against the Fourth Mizukage, forcing him to flee the village and live as a mercenary.
4. He took in an orphaned boy named Haku, intending to use him purely as a weapon while hiding his growing affection for him.
5. He was hired by the corrupt tycoon Gato to assassinate the bridge builder Tazuna, bringing him into conflict with Team 7.
6. He specialized in Hidden Mist Jutsu combined with Silent Killing, tracking enemies purely through sound and wind shifts.
7. He was incapacitated by Kakashi Hatake, leading Haku to sacrifice his own life to take a lethal Lightning Blade intended for him.
8. He was moved to tears by Naruto's emotional speech, turning on Gato and slaughtering his men using only a kunai in his mouth.
9. He died next to Haku on the Great Naruto Bridge, wishing to join his young partner in whatever afterlife awaited them.
10. He was reanimated during the war, explicitly thanking Kakashi for stopping him before he could damage his legacy any further.

Haku.quote: When a person has something precious they want to protect... that's when they can become truly strong.
lore: 1. He belonged to the Yuki clan, inheriting the Ice Release Kekkei Genkai that combined Water and Wind natures.
2. He killed his own father in self-defense after his father murdered his mother upon discovering her secret bloodline.
3. He lived as a starving street orphan before Zabuza Momochi found him and gave him a purpose as his personal weapon.
4. He possessed a kind, deeply pacifistic nature, frequently holding back in battles to disable targets rather than kill them.
5. He utilized senbon needles with surgical precision, able to put targets into a temporary, death-like coma instantly.
6. He could weave jutsu signs using only a single hand, a rare feat that completely shocked Kakashi Hatake.
7. He trapped Naruto and Sasuke inside his Demonic Mirroring Ice Crystals, pushing Sasuke to awaken his Sharingan.
8. He threw himself in front of Kakashi's Chidori to shield Zabuza, dying with a smile knowing he was useful to his master.
9. His pure, unselfish loyalty heavily shaped Naruto's early outlook on what it truly means to be a dedicated shinobi.
10. He was reanimated alongside Zabuza, feeling immense grief that he had to fight again despite dying to protect his master.

Hiruzen Sarutobi.quote: When the tree leaves dance, one shall find flames. The fire's shadow will illuminate the village... and once again, tree leaves shall bud anew.
lore: 1. He was trained directly by the first two Hokage and was named the Third Hokage by Tobirama Senju during a war retreat.
2. He was hailed as 'The Professor' due to his encyclopedic mastery of every single non-Kekkei Genkai jutsu in Konoha.
3. He held the office of Hokage longer than anyone else, stepping back into power after Minato Namikaze's tragic death.
4. He presided over a golden age of peace but struggled heavily with administrative choices, including his handling of Danzo and the Uchiha.
5. He personally trained the Legendary Sannin: Jiraiya, Orochimaru, and Tsunade, favoring Orochimaru's genius above all.
6. He could summon the Monkey King: Enma, who transformed into an unbreakable Adamantine Staff for close-quarters fighting.
7. He defended the village during the Konoha Crush arc, engaging his rogue student Orochimaru in a historic barrier duel.
8. He used the forbidden Reaper Death Seal to sacrifice his life, sealing the souls of the reanimated first two Hokage.
9. He permanently crippled Orochimaru's arsenal by sealing the chakra within his student's arms before dying with a peaceful smile.
10. He was reanimated during the war by Orochimaru, using his all-element mastery to counter Tobi's massive elemental attacks.

Tenten.quote: Three out of three! No matter what the target is, my weapons never miss their mark!
lore: 1. She is a dedicated kunoichi of Team Guy, training alongside Rock Lee and Neji Hyuga under Might Guy's intense regime.
2. Her ultimate dream was to become a legendary kunoichi like Tsunade, though she pivoted to weapons when medical jutsu failed her.
3. She specializes in Fuinjutsu space-time storage, using scrolls to store and launch thousands of weapons simultaneously.
4. She possesses perfect accuracy, capable of hitting small bullseyes from hundreds of yards away while moving through the air.
5. Her signature move, Twin Rising Dragons, creates a vortex of scrolls that rains down a continuous barrage of sharp iron.
6. She acts as the grounded, sensible voice of reason on her team, constantly exhausted by Guy and Lee's over-the-top antics.
7. During the Fourth Great Ninja War, she happened upon the Treasured Tools of the Six Paths, using them to destroy Kakuzu's masks.
8. The immense chakra drain from using the Six Paths tools nearly killed her, requiring extensive medical field treatment.
9. She was trapped inside the Infinite Tsukuyomi, dreaming of a world where Neji was alive and Guy acted like a regular adult.
10. In the Boruto era, she opened her own custom weapons shop in Konoha, though she struggles to make sales due to world peace.

Hanabi Hyuga.quote: If you don't stay true to your own path, you'll never be able to protect the things you care about.
lore: 1. She is the younger daughter of Hiashi Hyuga, showing a much fiercer, more naturally aggressive talent than her sister Hinata.
2. She defeated Hinata in a formal sparring duel arranged by their father, making her the prime heiress to the main house.
3. She underwent brutal, traditional training under her father's eye, mastering the Gentle Fist style early on.
4. Her eyes were violently stolen by Toneri Otsutsuki to awaken the Tenseigan, driving Naruto's team to mount a moon rescue mission.
5. She regained her sight after Toneri's defeat, developing a massive appreciation for Naruto's heroic heart.
6. She possesses an incredibly bubbly, affectionate personality outside of clan business, constantly doting on Boruto and Himawari.
7. She rose to the rank of Jonin and was given leadership over Team 15, guiding new kunoichi with a mix of fun and discipline.
8. She can execute the signature Eight Trigrams Palms Revolving Heaven, creating an absolute dome of defensive chakra.
9. She frequently tests Boruto's growth, engaging him in eye-activation sparring matches to see if his Jougan manifests.
10. She carries the future responsibility of the Hyuga clan, aiming to run it with the kinder, inclusive values her sister inspired.

Mei Terumi.quote: A handsome man... It breaks my heart to kill you, but you must dissolve away into history.
lore: 1. She became the Fifth Mizukage of Kirigakure, successfully ending the horrific 'Blood Mist' era instituted by her predecessor.
2. She holds the rare distinction of naturally possessing two distinct elemental Kekkei Genkai: Lava Release and Boil Release.
3. Her Boil Release creates a highly acidic vapor cloud capable of melting through the Ribcage Susanoo of Sasuke Uchiha.
4. Her Lava Release allows her to spit streams of molten rock that can shape the battlefield and trap fast opponents.
5. She is incredibly sensitive about her romantic life and age, constantly mishearing innocent words as slights about her being unmarried.
6. She guarded the Daimyo during the Fourth Great Ninja War, teaming up with Chojuro to defeat Black Zetsu's infiltration.
7. She fought alongside the other five Kage against Madara Uchiha, coordinating water and lava attacks to counter his fire.
8. She survived being critically wounded and split in half metaphorically by Madara's Perfect Susanoo strikes.
9. She stepped down from her position years after the war, passing the mantle of Mizukage to her trusted bodyguard, Chojuro.
10. She remains a prominent elder statesman in the hidden mist, assisting the village with foreign relations and domestic remodeling.

A (Fourth Raikage).quote: Shinobi should not bow their heads so easily! Action and power are what the ninja world respects!
lore: 1. He was the fierce Supreme Commander of the Allied Shinobi Forces and the leader of Kumogakure during the war.
2. He possessed physical speed and reflexes that could match the Yellow Flash, especially when his Lightning Release Armor was active.
3. He severed his own left arm without hesitation during his fight with Sasuke Uchiha to stop the spread of Amaterasu's flames.
4. He shared a legendary partnership with his adoptive brother Killer Bee, executing the devastating double-team Lariat.
5. His fighting style relied heavily on professional wrestling power moves, including his signature high-altitude Liger Bomb.
6. He harbored a deep, aggressive hatred for Akatsuki after they targeted his brother, prompting him to call the Five Kage Summit.
7. He initially tried to execute Naruto Uzumaki to prevent the Akatsuki from obtaining the Nine-Tails during the war.
8. He tested Naruto's resolve in a high-speed clash, ultimately stepping aside after Naruto dodged his fastest top-speed strike.
9. He stood alongside the other five Kage to battle Madara Uchiha, serving as the heavy vanguard attacker of the group.
10. In the peaceful era, he retired from his position, handing the Raikage mantle to Darui while staying active as an elder advisor.

Onoki.quote: Abandoning your own conviction is the exact moment a person dies. I will not let my iron will shatter!
lore: 1. He was the Third Tsuchikage of Iwagakure, known as 'Onoki of the Scale', and one of the longest-ruling shinobi in history.
2. He possessed the incredibly rare Kekkei Tota, Particle Style, which allowed him to atomize targets into dust on a molecular level.
3. He learned his signature atomic techniques from his master, Muu, whom he later had to face on the battlefield as an enemy.
4. He suffered from severe, chronic back pain due to his advanced age, which frequently flared up during critical combat moments.
5. He can manipulate his own weight or the weight of others, allowing him to fly or throw massive stone structures easily.
6. He had a stubborn, cynical personality that initially caused him to clash with the other leaders at the Five Kage Summit.
7. He stopped Madara Uchiha's colossal meteor strike by using his Light-Weight Rock Technique to catch it directly in mid-air.
8. He served as the spiritual anchor of the Five Kage during their losing battle against Madara, rekindling their collective will to fight.
9. He survived the war and lived long enough to witness the peaceful era, eventually retiring and passing his title to Kurotsuchi.
10. In his final years, he orchestrated a rogue project to create synthetic soldiers to protect youth, dying a heroic death to rectify his mistake.

Muu.quote: Tell the modern era... the only way to stop a Particle Style user is with another Particle Style user.
lore: 1. He was the Second Tsuchikage of Iwagakure, famously known throughout the elemental nations as the 'Null Man'.
2. He was completely covered in bandages from head to toe due to severe chemical burns suffered in past elemental conflicts.
3. He possessed the unique ability to erase his physical presence and chakra signature entirely using Dustless Bewildering Cover.
4. He was a master of Particle Style, teaching the complex three-element combination to his eager disciple, Onoki.
5. He shared a deadly, lifelong rivalry with Gengetsu Hozuki, the Second Mizukage, which eventually culminated in them killing each other.
6. He could split his physical body into two identical halves using a unique fission technique, though this halved his total power output.
7. He was reincarnated by Kabuto Yakushi during the war, serving as the primary summoner to bring forth the real Madara Uchiha.
8. He fought a prolonged tactical battle against his student Onoki and Gaara's division, utilizing his invisibility to dodge sensors.
9. His lower half managed to escape sealing by splitting his body right before a decisive blow landed on him.
10. His soul was finally released back to the afterlife after Itachi Uchiha forced Kabuto to terminate the Reanimation Jutsu.

Third Raikage.quote: My spear is the strongest offense. My body is the absolute defense. There is nothing I cannot pierce.
lore: 1. He was widely recognized as the greatest Raikage in Kumogakure history, possessing legendary physical durability.
2. His body was so incredibly tough that he could take a direct hit from a Wind Release: Rasenshuriken without sustaining vital damage.
3. He famously fought the Eight-Tails to a complete standstill, with both collapse-dating out of pure exhaustion during the clash.
4. The only scar on his entire body was a self-inflicted lightning burn on his chest, caused when he tripped onto his own piercing hand.
5. His ultimate offensive move was the Hell Stab, which focused lightning chakra into his fingers to create an unstoppable piercing spear.
6. He died a legendary heroic death, fighting off an army of ten thousand enemy shinobi single-handedly for three days to let his comrades escape.
7. He was reincarnated during the Fourth Great Ninja War, acting as an unstoppable tank that demolished the Allied advance squads.
8. He possessed the rare ability to utilize Black Lightning, a powerful trait that he eventually passed down to Darui.
9. He was outsmarted by Naruto Uzumaki, who used Sage Mode to redirect the Raikage's own ultimate spear right back into his scarred chest.
10. Once pinned and immobilized by his own momentum, he was quickly sealed away by the Allied Shinobi sealing teams.

Rin Nohara.quote: I'm always watching you, Kakashi... and Obito, too. I'll always be by your side, watching over you both.
lore: 1. She was a sweet, compassionate medical kunoichi of Team Minato, serving alongside Kakashi Hatake and Obito Uchiha.
2. She acted as the vital emotional glue of her squad, constantly mediating the fierce, petty rivalries between Kakashi and Obito.
3. She successfully transplanted Obito's Sharingan eye into Kakashi's damaged socket while under heavy fire during the Kannabi Bridge mission.
4. She was kidnapped by Hidden Mist shinobi who forcibly sealed the Three-Tails (Isobu) inside her to turn her into a living bomb.
5. The Mist planned to have her return to Konoha so the Tailed Beast could break out and destroy the village from the inside.
6. Recognizing the devious plot, she chose to throw herself directly in front of Kakashi's Chidori to protect her beloved home.
7. Her tragic death was witnessed directly by Obito, which shattered his mind and drove him to launch the Infinite Tsukuyomi plan.
8. Her physical passing left a permanent void in Kakashi's heart, driving his daily habit of visiting the memorial stone.
9. She waited patiently in the pure world afterlife for decades, watching over both of her teammates as they grew up.
10. She finally reunited with Obito's soul after his redemption and death, taking his hand to guide him into the afterlife together.

Tayuya.quote: You trash piece of garbage... I'll play a melody that will send your soul straight to hell!
lore: 1. She was the foul-mouthed, short-tempered kunoichi of the Sound Four, acting as the team's primary long-range tactical support.
2. She used a special Demonic Flute as her primary weapon, casting powerful sound-based genjutsu from safe distances.
3. She could summon three massive, club-wielding Doki (Phantom Warriors), controlling their movements purely through her flute melodies.
4. Her Curse Mark Level 2 transformation turned her skin brown, grew long horns on her head, and amplified her illusion chakra.
5. She fought Shikamaru Nara during the Sasuke Recovery Mission, pushing his tactical brilliance to its absolute limits.
6. She was caught off guard when Shikamaru managed to break her genjutsu by intentionally breaking his own finger to cause pain.
7. She was completely overwhelmed when Temari arrived as backup, using Giant Folding Fan wind gusts to level the forest.
8. She was crushed to death under falling trees after Temari summoned Kamatari to slice apart her defensive positions.
9. She was briefly brought back in a filler arc by Kabuto to seek revenge, but was defeated again by the stronger Konoha kids.
10. Her unique sound abilities were eventually integrated into Kabuto Yakushi's own body modification pool during his Sage training.

Jirobo.quote: The weak have no choice but to be trampled by the strong. That is the reality of our world.
lore: 1. He was the physically largest member of the Sound Four, though ironically ranked as the weakest in total tactical skill.
2. He was constantly berated and called fat or useless by Tayuya, though he routinely advised her to watch her vulgar language.
3. He specialized in heavy Earth Release techniques, capable of raising massive stone barriers to trap entire squads.
4. He could absorb chakra from enemies trapped inside his Earth Dome, slowly draining their stamina to fuel his own moves.
5. His Curse Mark Level 2 transformation granted him red hair, warty skin, and ten times his normal physical lifting power.
6. He stayed behind to fight Choji Akimichi, confidently believing he could easily crush the Konoha heavy hitter.
7. He mocked Choji's weight and insulted his deep bond with Shikamaru, completely infuriating the young Akimichi.
8. He was overwhelmed when Choji consumed the legendary Three Colored Pills, unlocking his high-level Butterfly Mode.
9. He was killed by a single, colossal chakra punch to the chest that left a massive crater in the forest floor.
10. His DNA was later harvested by Kabuto, allowing the snake sage to sprout Jirobo's torso to use terraforming earth techniques.

Sakon and Ukon.quote: Two bodies in one... We are the ultimate tag team, and you don't stand a ghost of a chance.
lore: 1. They were twin brothers who held the rank of leader within the Sound Four due to their cruel, unpredictable fighting style.
2. Ukon usually slept inside Sakon's physical body, with his head occasionally sprouting from Sakon's back to block blindside attacks.
3. Their unique Kekkei Genkai allowed them to break down their physical bodies at a cellular level to fuse with other living beings.
4. They could summon a singular, massive Rashomon Gate to block high-level projectile attacks and absolute physical impacts.
5. Their Curse Mark Level 2 transformation gave them a demonic, single-horned appearance while increasing their speed.
6. During the rescue arc, Ukon split off to infiltrate Kiba Inuzuka's body, attempting to kill him from the inside out.
7. They were forced out when Kiba stabbed his own stomach, using mutual pain to protect his companion Akamaru.
8. They cornered Kiba and Akamaru in a canyon, but their final execution attempt was interrupted by Kankuro's sudden arrival.
9. They were outsmarted by Kankuro's puppet tactics, being tricked into entering the dark interior of the Black Ant puppet.
10. They were executed inside the puppet container via the Iron Maiden technique, being pierced by multiple hidden blades.

Kidomaru.quote: A spider always enjoys watching its prey squirm inside the web before delivering the final bite.
lore: 1. He was an intellectual, game-loving member of the Sound Four who possessed six fully functional arms and a spider-like physiology.
2. He could generate a unique liquid that hardened instantly into unbreakable web threads upon contact with outside air.
3. He could fashion a specialized metallic armor or sharp weapons out of his body fluids, called Spider Sticky Gold.
4. He treated life-or-death battles like a tactical video game, assigning difficulty ranks to opponents as he fought them.
5. He stayed behind to counter Neji Hyuga, quickly deducing the strict blind spot of the Gentle Fist's Byakugan vision.
6. He kept his distance by climbing high into the forest canopy, raining down heavy sticky arrows using a massive longbow.
7. He opened a third eye on his forehead under his Curse Mark Level 2 state to achieve absolute precision over long distances.
8. He was defeated when Neji intentionally let a thick chakra thread arrow pierce his body to channel Gentle Fist energy back up.
9. The intense burst of internal chakra traveled along the web line, completely rupturing Kidomaru's internal organs.
10. He fell from the trees and died of his internal injuries, completely stunned that a ninja could weaponize their own blind spot.

Kaguya Otsutsuki.quote: All chakra belongs to me. Once again, all of it shall become one within my body!
lore: 1. She was the absolute matriarch of the Otsutsuki clan on Earth, arriving millennia ago to cultivate the planet's God Tree.
2. She consumed the forbidden Fruit of the God Tree, becoming the very first sentient being to possess and manipulate chakra.
3. She established a tyrannical peace, eventually merging with the God Tree to transform into the terrifying Ten-Tails beast.
4. She was sealed away into the moon by her own twin sons, Hagoromo and Hamura, who rebelled against her dark rule.
5. She spent centuries plotting her return through Black Zetsu, who manipulated generations of shinobi history to revive her.
6. She was successfully resurrected near the end of the Fourth Great Ninja War, using Madara Uchiha's physical body as a catalyst.
7. She possessed the devastating All-Killing Ash Bones, a technique that turned any living target into piles of dust upon contact.
8. She could seamlessly shift entire battlefields into distinct alternate dimensions, including fields of pure lava or high gravity.
9. She was caught off guard by Naruto's ridiculous Reverse Sexy Jutsu, creating a brief opening for Team 7 to mount an attack.
10. She was permanently sealed away a second time by Naruto and Sasuke using the Six Paths: Chibaku Tensei technique.

Hagoromo Otsutsuki.quote: I am the one who created peace and order. I am the Sage of the Six Paths.
lore: 1. He was the legendary Sage of the Six Paths, revered across generations as the founding father of the entire shinobi way of life.
2. He was born with the Rinnegan, utilizing its immense god-like power to establish the philosophical concepts of Ninshu.
3. Alongside his twin brother Hamura, he battled his corrupted mother Kaguya for months to protect the planet's remaining life.
4. He became the very first Jinchuriki of the Ten-Tails after successfully sealing his mother's physical form away.
5. Using his incredible Creation of All Things jutsu, he split the massive Ten-Tails chakra pool into nine individual Tailed Beasts.
6. He gave the nine newborn beasts independent names and identities, wishing for them to find a savior in the distant future.
7. He chose his younger son, Asura, to inherit his vast spiritual legacy, triggering a tragic, generational family feud.
8. His lingering soul manifested as a chakra entity during the war to speak directly with Naruto Uzumaki and Sasuke Uchiha.
9. He bestowed his signature Six Paths powers to both boys, granting them the Yin and Yang marks needed to seal Kaguya.
10. He summoned the spirits of all past Kage to help pull Team 7 back from Kaguya's dimensions before returning to the pure land.

Hamura Otsutsuki.quote: I will go to the moon to watch over our mother... and ensure she never breaks free again.
lore: 1. He was the twin brother of Hagoromo and the ancestor of both the Hyuga clan on Earth and the Otsutsuki clan on the Moon.
2. He possessed a highly refined Byakugan from birth, using its absolute vision to coordinate attacks alongside his brother.
3. He fell under his mother's mind control briefly during their youth, forcing Hagoromo to fight and mortally wound him to break it.
4. He fought valiantly against the Ten-Tails, wielding a unique staff made of pure Six Paths Truth-Seeking energy.
5. Following their victory over Kaguya, he chose to relocate his entire family lineage to the moon to act as eternal guards over her seal.
6. He awakened the legendary Tenseigan eye, utilizing its massive gravity manipulation powers to stabilize the lunar colony.
7. Before departing Earth, he left behind a faction of his bloodline, which eventually evolved into the noble Hyuga clan.
8. His lunar descendants eventually misinterpreted his core decrees, leading to a civil war that wiped out most of the colony.
9. His spiritual manifestation appeared to Hinata Hyuga, recognizing her as the Byakugan Princess and granting her his chakra.
10. His ancient power was vital in destroying the Energy Vessel that Toneri Otsutsuki used to try and crash the moon into Earth.

Indra Otsutsuki.quote: Power is the only force that can bring order and compliance to this chaotic world.
lore: 1. He was the brilliant elder son of Hagoromo Otsutsuki, recognized as the true progenitor of the legendary Uchiha clan.
2. He was a natural prodigy, inventing hand signs and modern ninjutsu style applications to make Ninshu easier to weaponize.
3. He awakened the Sharingan after saving his brother from a wild beast, accelerating his combat visual acuity.
4. His cold, analytical nature led him to believe that absolute power and strict laws were the only paths to lasting world peace.
5. He was subtly manipulated by Black Zetsu, who played on his pride to drive a deep wedge between him and his family.
6. He was completely outraged when his father chose his weaker, kind brother Asura to lead the Ninshu sect.
7. He unlocked the Mangekyo Sharingan out of pure spite and launched a devastating attack on his family's village.
8. He was repelled when Asura received collective chakra from the villagers, forcing Indra to flee into exile.
9. He vowed on his deathbed that his soul would reincarnate infinitely to destroy his brother's legacy across time.
10. His vengeful chakra reincarnated through historical figures, most notably Madara Uchiha and later Sasuke Uchiha.

Asura Otsutsuki.quote: Real strength doesn't come from yourself. It comes from the bonds you forge with the people around you.
lore: 1. He was the younger son of Hagoromo Otsutsuki and the direct ancestor of both the Senju and Uzumaki clans.
2. Unlike his genius brother Indra, he possessed zero natural talent as a child, requiring years of hard work to unlock chakra.
3. He realized the value of cooperation while helping a village build an irrigation system, gaining their deep trust.
4. His collective, empathetic mindset convinced his father that love, not power, was the true key to running Ninshu.
5. He was chosen as the official successor of the sect, which instantly triggered a violent war with his brother Indra.
6. He received the full power of Hagoromo's Six Paths Senjutsu to match Indra's terrifying Perfect Susanoo.
7. He could manifest a massive, multi-armed wood-like avatar that launched giant spinning chakra spheres at his targets.
8. He deeply regretted his inability to save his brother from darkness, vowing to reincarnate alongside him forever.
9. His peaceful chakra passed down through generations, manifesting within Hashirama Senju and eventually Naruto Uzumaki.
10. The endless cycle of conflict between his and Indra's spirits was finally broken when Naruto and Sasuke reconciled.

Kawaki.quote: I'll do whatever it takes to protect Seventh Hokage... even if it means becoming a monster or killing my own brother.
lore: 1. He was raised by an abusive biological father before being purchased by Jigen to serve as a vessel for Isshiki Otsutsuki.
2. He underwent horrific, torturous experimentation to successfully receive the alien entity's Karma mark.
3. His entire physical body was heavily modified with advanced microscopic tech, allowing him to shapeshift his limbs into blades.
4. He escaped Kara and was taken in by Naruto Uzumaki, developing an intense, fanatical devotion to the Seventh Hokage.
5. He bonded with Boruto over their shared affliction, with both resolving to find a way to get rid of their Karma marks.
6. His obsession with Naruto's safety turned dark, leading him to seal Naruto and Hinata in a pocket dimension to keep them safe.
7. He resolved to murder Boruto to ensure that Momoshiki Otsutsuki could never resurrect and threaten Naruto's life.
8. He used Eida's Omnipotence to swap lives with Boruto, making himself the beloved son of Konoha while framing Boruto as a traitor.
9. During the timeskip, he unlocked Isshiki's signature techniques, including shrinking objects and using Daikokuten rods.
10. He continues to hunt Boruto relentlessly, completely blind to the fact that his toxic actions are destroying the village.

Code.quote: Your names are written on my hit list... and I intend to carve them into your graves one by one.
lore: 1. He was the last remaining inner member of the criminal organization Kara, harboring a religious worship of the Otsutsuki clan.
2. He survived Isshiki's vessel trials but received a non-functional 'White Karma' that granted pure power without a soul.
3. His natural strength was so immensely vast that Jigen installed special limiters on his body to keep his power in check.
4. He utilizes unique Claw Marks, a band of black material that acts as a physical portal network he can teleport through.
5. He sought out Eida and Daemon after Jigen's death, forming a temporary alliance to get revenge on Konohagakure.
6. He had his physical limiters successfully removed by Amado, unlocking his full, terrifying destructive capacity.
7. He created the Claw Grimes by infusing the Ten-Tails' body mass with his teleportation bands, creating a massive army.
8. His invasion of Konoha backfired horribly when Boruto returned and utterly dominated him using the Rasengan: Uzuhiko.
9. He lost absolute control over his Claw Grimes when they evolved independently into sentient, dangerous Divine Trees.
10. He remains a dangerous rogue wildcard, fleeing from both Konoha and his own out-of-control mutant creations.

Eida.quote: You can't help but love me. It's not a choice... it's an absolute law written into your own DNA.
lore: 1. She is a highly modified cyborg created by Amado, possessing abilities that far surpass standard ninja capabilities.
2. She possesses the Senrigan, an all-seeing eye that allows her to look into any current event or past event up to her birth.
3. Her passive ability causes anyone in her presence to fall completely infatuated with her, preventing them from attacking.
4. Her infatuation charm does not work on blood relatives or high-level Otsutsuki individuals like Boruto or Kawaki.
5. She harbors a deep resentment toward Amado for stripping away her ability to experience true, organic romance.
6. She agreed to move to Konoha as part of a diplomatic cohabitation program to try and court Kawaki normally.
7. Out of a desire to ease Kawaki's mental anguish, she sub-consciously triggered the god-like reality shift called Omnipotence.
8. Omnipotence successfully rewritten the memories of the entire world, swapping Boruto and Kawaki's histories.
9. She felt deep guilt over her actions, choosing to secretly apologize to Boruto while promising not to reveal his location.
10. She spends most of her days living under guard in a luxury villa, watching the chaotic global fallout of her mistake.

Daemon.quote: The moment you even think about hurting me... you've already ended your own life!
lore: 1. He is Eida's younger brother, an incredibly hyperactive cyborg engineered by Amado to act as her ultimate protector.
2. He possesses an absolute, terrifying broken ability that automatically reflects an opponent's killing intent right back at them.
3. If an enemy imagines slicing his head off, their own head is severed instantly before they can even initiate the movement.
4. For his reflection ability to function at full capacity, his hands must be touching another physical person.
5. Despite his childish, bratty demeanor, his raw physical speed and taijutsu power are among the highest in the entire universe.
6. He easily overwhelmed Kawaki and Code in pure hand-to-hand combat without even needing to activate his reflection rules.
7. He accompanies his sister everywhere, acting as her muscle while frequently playing video games or riding on people's backs.
8. He was one of the very few individuals who instantly noticed Boruto's dramatic surge in strength after the timeskip.
9. He remains completely unaffected by his sister's passive infatuation charm due to their direct genetic sibling bond.
10. He resides in Konoha's high-security housing, serving as an absolute deterrent against anyone trying to assassinate Eida.

Danzo Shimura.quote: A ninja is one who endures. To protect the peace, one must be willing to walk through the deepest filth.
lore: 1. He was the ruthless, scheming founder of Root, a black-ops sub-division of Konoha's ANBU that operated in total secrecy.
2. He was a lifelong rival of the Third Hokage, constantly advocating for aggressive, underhanded methods to secure the village.
3. He orchestrated the tragic Uchiha clan massacre alongside Itachi, capitalizing on the political tension to steal their eyes.
4. His right arm was an artificial creation embedded with multiple Sharingan eyes and Hashirama cells, crafted by Orochimaru.
5. He could use the ultimate Uchiha illusion, Izanagi, multiple times to rewrite his own death during active combat.
6. He stole Shisui Uchiha's right eye, hiding it under his head bandages to subtly use Kotoamatsukami during political meetings.
7. He successfully manipulated events during the Five Kage Summit to briefly get himself appointed as the leader of the Alliance.
8. He was cornered and hunted down by Sasuke Uchiha, who sought absolute vengeance for the destruction of his family.
9. He was completely outsmarted during their duel when Sasuke used a subtle genjutsu to trick him into miscounting his active eyes.
10. He died a gruesome death, activating a Reverse Four Symbols Sealing jutsu in a failed attempt to drag Sasuke and Tobi down with him.
